---
title: "Jar Flux Analysis"
author: "Adrianne Seiden"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: darkly
    highlight: zenburn
    code_folding: hide
knit: (function(inputFile, encoding) {
    rmarkdown::render(inputFile, encoding = encoding,
                     output_dir = "../adrianne-code/") })
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

# Set CRAN mirror
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org/"))

# Set Box path
box_base <- Sys.getenv("BOX_BASE")
if (box_base == "") stop("BOX_BASE environment variable is not set!")

# Set paths
csv_folder <- file.path(box_base, "Salk Institute Project/AKS Salk files/CO2 data")
outputs_folder <- file.path(box_base, "Salk Institute Project/AKS Salk files/CO2 data/confounding-factors-outputs")

# Load required libraries
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(purrr)
library(ggplot2)

# Source centralized theme and color configuration
source(file.path(dirname(knitr::current_input()), "config/theme_colors_config.R"))

# Ensure theme is set and variables are initialized
theme_set(theme_dark_custom())

```

## Load Data

```{r load-data}
library(ggplot2)

read_flux_csv <- function(path, week_label) {
  df <- read.csv(path, check.names = FALSE, fileEncoding = "UTF-8-BOM")
  df$week <- week_label
  df
}

wk10 <- read_flux_csv(file.path(csv_folder, "wk10_flux_factors_jars.csv"), "Week 10")
wk20 <- read_flux_csv(file.path(csv_folder, "wk20_flux_factors_jars.csv"), "Week 20")
wk30 <- read_flux_csv(file.path(csv_folder, "wk30_flux_factors_jars.csv"), "Week 30")

# Rename the cumulative flux column for easier use
rename_flux <- function(df) {
  flux_col <- grep("cumul_Flux", names(df), value = TRUE)[1]
  names(df)[names(df) == flux_col] <- "cumul_flux"
  df$crop <- factor(df$crop, levels = names(crop_colors))
  df
}

wk10 <- rename_flux(wk10)
wk20 <- rename_flux(wk20)
wk30 <- rename_flux(wk30)

all_data <- bind_rows(wk10, wk20, wk30)
all_data$week <- factor(all_data$week, levels = c("Week 10", "Week 20", "Week 30"))

# Global y limits shared across all flux plots
global_y_limits <- range(all_data$cumul_flux, na.rm = TRUE)

format_p_value <- function(p_value) {
  case_when(
    is.na(p_value) ~ "p = NA",
    p_value < 0.001 ~ "p < 0.001",
    TRUE ~ paste0("p = ", formatC(p_value, format = "f", digits = 3))
  )
}

compute_regression_stats <- function(data, x_var) {
  data %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[x_var]]), !is.na(cumul_flux), !is.na(crop)) %>%
    group_by(week, crop) %>%
    group_modify(~ {
      if (nrow(.x) < 2 || dplyr::n_distinct(.x[[x_var]]) < 2) {
        return(tibble(r_squared = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_))
      }

      model <- lm(reformulate(x_var, response = "cumul_flux"), data = .x)
      model_summary <- summary(model)
      slope_p_value <- coef(model_summary)[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

      tibble(
        r_squared = model_summary$r.squared,
        p_value = slope_p_value
      )
    }) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      label = if_else(
        is.na(r_squared),
        "R² = NA, p = NA",
        paste0(
          "R² = ", sprintf("%.2f", r_squared),
          ", ", format_p_value(p_value),
          if_else(!is.na(p_value) & p_value < 0.05, "*", "")
        )
      ),
      fontface = if_else(!is.na(p_value) & p_value < 0.05, "bold", "plain")
    )
}

build_annotation_df <- function(data, x_var) {
  stats_df <- compute_regression_stats(data, x_var)

  panel_positions <- data %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[x_var]]), !is.na(cumul_flux), !is.na(crop)) %>%
    group_by(week) %>%
    summarise(
      x_min = min(.data[[x_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      x_span = diff(range(.data[[x_var]], na.rm = TRUE)),
      y_max = max(cumul_flux, na.rm = TRUE),
      y_span = diff(range(cumul_flux, na.rm = TRUE)),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  stats_df %>%
    left_join(panel_positions, by = "week") %>%
    mutate(crop = factor(crop, levels = names(crop_colors))) %>%
    arrange(week, crop) %>%
    group_by(week) %>%
    mutate(
      x_step = if_else(x_span > 0, x_span, pmax(abs(x_min), 1)),
      x = x_min + 0.03 * x_step,
      y = Inf,
      vjust = 1.2 + (row_number() - 1) * 1.5
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
}

make_flux_plot <- function(data, x_var, x_label, plot_title, top_expand = 0.08, y_limits = NULL) {
  annotation_df <- build_annotation_df(data, x_var)

  ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = cumul_flux, color = crop)) +
    geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, aes(fill = crop), alpha = 0.15, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_text(
      data = annotation_df,
      aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, color = crop, fontface = fontface, vjust = vjust),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      hjust = 0,
      size = 3.2,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = crop_colors) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = crop_colors) +
    guides(fill = "none") +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = y_limits, expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, top_expand))) +
    facet_wrap(~week, nrow = 1) +
    labs(
      x = x_label,
      y = expression("Cumulative flux ("*mu*"g CO"[2]*"-C g"^{-1}*" soil min"^{-1}*")"),
      color = "Crop", fill = "Crop",
      title = plot_title
    ) +
    theme_dark() +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#0B0B0B", color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#111111", color = NA),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#3A3A3A", linewidth = 0.25),
      panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "#242424", linewidth = 0.2),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "#F5F5F5"),
      axis.title = element_text(color = "#FFFFFF"),
      plot.title = element_text(color = "#FFFFFF", face = "bold"),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#0B0B0B", color = NA),
      legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#111111", color = NA),
      legend.text = element_text(color = "#F5F5F5"),
      legend.title = element_text(color = "#FFFFFF"),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#1E1E1E", color = "#4D4D4D"),
      strip.text = element_text(color = "#FFFFFF")
    )
}
```

## Cumulative Flux vs Initial Litter Mass

```{r plot-flux-vs-mass, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}
make_flux_plot(
  data = all_data,
  x_var = "initial_mass_mg",
  x_label = "Initial root litter mass (mg)",
  plot_title = expression("Cumulative " * CO[2] * " flux vs initial litter mass"),
  top_expand = 0.10,
  y_limits = global_y_limits
)
```

## Cumulative Flux vs Average Gravimetric Water Content

```{r plot-flux-vs-gwc, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}
make_flux_plot(
  data = all_data,
  x_var = "avg_GWC",
  x_label = "Average gravimetric water content (g/g)",
  plot_title = expression("Cumulative " * CO[2] * " flux vs average GWC"),
  y_limits = global_y_limits
)
```

## Cumulative Flux vs Average Sealed Time

```{r plot-flux-vs-sealtime, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}
make_flux_plot(
  data = all_data,
  x_var = "avg_seal_time",
  x_label = "Average interval duration (minutes)",
  plot_title = expression("Cumulative " * CO[2] * " flux vs average sealed time"),
  y_limits = global_y_limits
)
```

## Combined Trendline Plots (all crops pooled)

```{r combined-stats}
compute_regression_stats_pooled <- function(data, x_var) {
  data %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[x_var]]), !is.na(cumul_flux)) %>%
    group_by(week) %>%
    group_modify(~ {
      if (nrow(.x) < 2 || dplyr::n_distinct(.x[[x_var]]) < 2) {
        return(tibble(r_squared = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_))
      }
      model <- lm(reformulate(x_var, response = "cumul_flux"), data = .x)
      s <- summary(model)
      tibble(r_squared = s$r.squared, p_value = coef(s)[2, "Pr(>|t|)"])
    }) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      label = if_else(
        is.na(r_squared),
        "R\u00b2 = NA, p = NA",
        paste0(
          "R\u00b2 = ", sprintf("%.2f", r_squared),
          ", ", format_p_value(p_value),
          if_else(!is.na(p_value) & p_value < 0.05, "*", "")
        )
      ),
      fontface = if_else(!is.na(p_value) & p_value < 0.05, "bold", "plain")
    )
}

build_annotation_df_pooled <- function(data, x_var) {
  stats_df <- compute_regression_stats_pooled(data, x_var)

  panel_positions <- data %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[x_var]]), !is.na(cumul_flux)) %>%
    group_by(week) %>%
    summarise(
      x_min = min(.data[[x_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      x_span = diff(range(.data[[x_var]], na.rm = TRUE)),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  stats_df %>%
    left_join(panel_positions, by = "week") %>%
    mutate(
      x_step = if_else(x_span > 0, x_span, pmax(abs(x_min), 1)),
      x = x_min + 0.03 * x_step,
      y = Inf,
      vjust = 1.5
    )
}

make_flux_plot_pooled <- function(data, x_var, x_label, plot_title, top_expand = 0.08, y_limits = NULL) {
  annotation_df <- build_annotation_df_pooled(data, x_var)

  ggplot(data, aes(x = .data[[x_var]], y = cumul_flux, color = crop)) +
    geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_smooth(
      aes(group = 1), method = "lm", se = TRUE,
      color = "grey30", fill = "grey70", alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 0.8
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = annotation_df,
      aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, fontface = fontface, vjust = vjust),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      hjust = 0, size = 3.2, color = "#e8e8e8",
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = crop_colors) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = y_limits, expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, top_expand))) +
    facet_wrap(~week, nrow = 1) +
    labs(
      x = x_label,
      y = expression("Cumulative flux ("*mu*"g CO"[2]*"-C g"^{-1}*" soil min"^{-1}*")"),
      color = "Crop",
      title = plot_title
    ) +
    theme_dark() +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#0B0B0B", color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#111111", color = NA),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#3A3A3A", linewidth = 0.25),
      panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "#242424", linewidth = 0.2),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "#F5F5F5"),
      axis.title = element_text(color = "#FFFFFF"),
      plot.title = element_text(color = "#FFFFFF", face = "bold"),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#0B0B0B", color = NA),
      legend.key = element_rect(fill = "#111111", color = NA),
      legend.text = element_text(color = "#F5F5F5"),
      legend.title = element_text(color = "#FFFFFF"),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#1E1E1E", color = "#4D4D4D"),
      strip.text = element_text(color = "#FFFFFF")
    )
}
```

### Flux vs Initial Litter Mass (pooled)

```{r plot-pooled-mass, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}
make_flux_plot_pooled(
  data = all_data,
  x_var = "initial_mass_mg",
  x_label = "Initial root litter mass (mg)",
  plot_title = expression("Cumulative " * CO[2] * " flux vs initial litter mass (pooled)"),
  top_expand = 0.12,
  y_limits = global_y_limits
)
```

### Flux vs Average GWC (pooled)

```{r plot-pooled-gwc, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}
make_flux_plot_pooled(
  data = all_data,
  x_var = "avg_GWC",
  x_label = "Average gravimetric water content (g/g)",
  plot_title = expression("Cumulative " * CO[2] * " flux vs average GWC (pooled)"),
  y_limits = global_y_limits
)
```

### Flux vs Average Sealed Time (pooled)

```{r plot-pooled-sealtime, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}
make_flux_plot_pooled(
  data = all_data,
  x_var = "avg_seal_time",
  x_label = "Average interval duration (minutes)",
  plot_title = expression("Cumulative " * CO[2] * " flux vs average sealed time (pooled)"),
  y_limits = global_y_limits
)
```
